QUERY.declare: <DATA oi_empresa="1" oi_banco="1" oi_sucursal="" f_acreditacion="20111101" f_vencimiento="" interface="STANDARDBANK"> <LIQS> <LIQ oi_liquidacion="27" /> </LIQS> </DATA>

qry:select.name: SQL1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT PE.c_personal, SUM(TLP.n_totpag) AS n_totpag, MAX(PE.c_cta_bancaria) as c_cta_bancaria, MAX(PE.c_cbu) as c_cbu, MAX(PE.c_tipo_documento) as c_tipo_documento, MAX(PE.c_nro_documento) as c_nro_documento, MAX(PE.d_ape_y_nom) as d_ape_y_nom FROM LIQ20_TOT_LIQ_PER as TLP, LIQ99_RECIBOS as REC, LIQ97_PERSONAL_EMP as PE, LIQ99_LIQUIDACION as LIQ, LIQ19_EJECUCIONES as EJ, PER31_FORMAS_PAGO as FP, LIQ22_BANCOS as BAN JOIN LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER REC.oi_liquidacion_ddo, REC.oi_tot_liq_per INNER TLP.oi_tot_liq_per, TLP.oi_per_emp_ddo INNER PE.oi_per_emp_ddo, LIQ.oi_liquidacion_ddo INNER EJ.oi_liquidacion_ddo, FP.c_forma_pago INNER TLP.c_forma_pago, BAN.c_banco INNER PE.c_banco WHERE LIQ.c_estado = \'F\' AND BAN.oi_banco = {#SOURCE:@oi_banco} AND EJ.oi_liquidacion IN ({%= STRING(#SOURCE:LIQS/LIQ/@oi_liquidacion) %}) AND FP.l_banco = 1 AND TLP.n_totpag > 0 GROUP BY PE.c_personal ')/ROWS/ROW
